current_chart_value: The patient, John Slatauski, age 85, has been referred for home health services following a recent left shoulder arthroscopy and rotator cuff repair performed on April 10, 2026, due to a complete rotator cuff tear. His primary diagnosis is the post-surgical condition related to the left shoulder surgery (ICD-10-CM M75.122), and he has multiple comorbidities, including type 2 diabetes mellitus, hypertension, and a history of vitamin D deficiency, which further complicate his recovery process.
